stem: Q = NOT A is a Boolean expression with a single input A.
model_answer: NOT inverts the input. Truth table: A=0 => Q=1; A=1 => Q=0.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Complete the truth table for Q = NOT A.

mark_points.text: Q = 1 when A = 0 and Q = 0 when A = 1 (NOT inverts the input)
accepted_alternatives: output is the opposite of input
